title: Super Bedwars
description: The best way to play Bedwars, with performance optimizations + QoL features that don't use weird add-on apps!
body:
# Super Bedwars
Super Bedwars is the best way to play Bedwars! You can use very useful features like zoom, without weird mods that completely change the game, such as the ones used in Bed Client. This modpack contains performance optimizations, along with QoL features just for Hypixel! There are Wavey Capes, too which greatly enhances the visual looks of capes. This modpack also **contains the Replay Mod**, so you can record your gameplay to make YouTube videos or just for watching.

This is a one-off and will not be updated, since the version of the game this runs on is 1.8.9.
